title: Seasonal influenza vaccine uptake in healthcare workers: winter season 2024 to 2025
body: "Report containing data collected for the final survey of frontline healthcare workers (HCWs).  The data reflects cumulative vaccinations administered during the period of 1 September 2024 to 28 February 2025 (inclusive).  Data is presented at national, NHS England region and individual trust level.  The report is aimed at professionals directly involved in the delivery of the influenza vaccine, including:   screening and immunisation teams government organisations researchers   See the pre-release access list.  "
